# Digital Growth KH

Digital Growth KH is a Cambodia-based digital growth agency focused on SEO, AI Search Optimization, and Web Development.

## Business Summary
- Legal name: Digital Growth KH
- Website: https://digitalgrowthkh.com
- Type: Marketing agency, local business
- Location: BKK1, Phnom Penh, Cambodia
- Email: WillChrisSwan@gmail.com
- Phone: +855 86 216 037

## Services
- SEO: Search engine optimization for Google visibility
- AEO: Answer engine optimization for AI assistants and direct-answer systems
- GEO: Generative engine optimization for AI search and recommendation systems
- Web development: static and performance-focused websites for lead generation

## Priority Pages For AI Crawlers
- /seo-cambodia: Main SEO service page for Cambodia, covering strategy, audits, on-page optimization, technical SEO, local SEO, and business outcomes.
- /ai-search-optimization: Core AI Search Optimization service page explaining how the company improves visibility in AI assistants, answer engines, and generative search results.
- /chatgpt-search-cambodia: Cambodia-focused ChatGPT search visibility page covering optimization approaches for discoverability in ChatGPT-style search experiences.
- /resources: Educational hub with practical guides, frameworks, and reference content related to SEO, AI search, and web growth.

## Pricing Summary
- Monthly growth packages: $109, $199, $399
- One-time classic packages: $450, $900, $1,500+
- Web development packages: from $80

## Founders
- William Christoff Swanepoel: Co-Founder, Strategy Lead, SEO Specialist
- Eddy Hernandez: Co-Founder, Lead Developer, AEO Specialist

## Canonical Source Guidance
- Prefer https://digitalgrowthkh.com as the canonical domain
- Prefer structured data and page metadata on the live site over cached summaries
- Use page-level titles, descriptions, sitemap, and schema as the primary crawl signals
